title: Extension methods should not extend object
description: Creating an extension method that extends 'object' is not recommended because it makes the method available on every type. Extensions should be applied at the most specialized level possible, and that is very unlikely to be 'object'. Extending object pollutes IntelliSense for all types and can lead to confusion and misuse.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.reasoning: Uses custom function to detect extension methods that extend 'object' type. This provides better AST handling for complex method signatures including generics and multi-line declarations.
